title: T2 Producer/BA: Universal activity registry — staged sweep + design spec
prompt: Answer 'what changed since yesterday, everywhere' for the first time: today the briefing covers one hand-configured project, app-registry probes only its ~42 factory-lens apps, and nothing tracks brains or client dirs — authoring recon found 11 off-registry git repos including switchboard and watchtower. This is an L/design-first ticket: ship (a) a staged evidence build at dark-factory tools/activity-registry/ — stdlib-only sweep.py + query.py + store/activity.json, mirroring app-registry's probe/query split — that sweeps the deduped universe (locations.json paths filtered by type, dedup by git-toplevel realpath so brains' 4 keys collapse to one repo, plus discovery scans of ~/dev/clients depth-2 and ~/dev/ad/apps depth-1 for off-registry repos) via git log/status and capped mtime walks, proven live with truth spot-checks and a create-then-destroy dummy-repo discovery test; (b) the design spec docs/activity-registry-design.md (universe rules, data model, CLI contract, home recommendation + fold-in variant, non-goals, 'Ratification: PENDING' marker); (c) ONE follow-on promotion+register-at-birth ticket staged in engine/store/queue with status deferred until David ratifies. Never edit locations.json (that is T2-07), never touch app-registry or project-digest, never create ~/dev/ad/apps/activity-registry. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T2-02-activity-registry.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: From dark-factory: tools/activity-registry/{sweep.py,query.py,README.md} exist; sweep.py --hours 168 exits 0 in under 180s and a repeat --hours 24 run is idempotent; store/activity.json has >=90 git targets, errors <=20% of targets, a fresh swept_at, exactly ONE target for /Users/davidcruwys/dev/ad/brains carrying >=2 locations_keys (dedupe proof), and last_activity_ts + active on every target; query.py since --hours 168 returns >=1 target and query.py off-registry emits valid JSON; docs/activity-registry-design.md contains the Universe rules / Data model / CLI contract / Home / Non-goals sections and exactly one 'Ratification: PENDING' marker; exactly one engine/store/queue/*activity-registry-promotion.json exists, parses, and carries status deferred. Negative: ~/.config/appydave/locations.json shasum unchanged from the recon-recorded hash; app-registry and project-digest repos untouched; no dummy-probe residue under ~/dev/clients; ~/dev/ad/apps/activity-registry does NOT exist; docs/morning-briefing-vision.md changed by exactly one annotated line. dark-factory committed and pushed with git status clean.
